TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Masiela_Lusha, title = Masiela_Lusha, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Masiela_Lusha} }

S.FORM: Masiela Lusha kawas tay 1985, ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 10, Masiela Lusha, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Masiela Lusha kawas tay 1985, ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 10, Masiela Lusha, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: mas~ɕiela lus~ɕħa kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, mas~ɕiela lus~ɕħa, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
